title: full-grown
description:
This lightweight yet incredibly useful resource pack adds clear, visible exclamation marks above fully-grown crops, letting you instantly know when they’re ready to harvest.

credits to @doesnotsitproperly 
this is a continueation of that mod with updates
body: Adds exclamation points over fully-grown crops. If you've ever been unsure of whether or not a crop is ready to be harvested, worry no longer! This is a simple resource pack that is designed for convenience and includes support for several mods such as Farmer's Delight, Neapolitan, and Supplementaries!!["What is N.F.?" N.F. is an add-on that adds support for "non-farmland" crops like sweet berries. (Admittedly, this distinction is a little unclear.)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ac6701a24a7abdaf4b9cd2b2f8813bc0cdbf0173.png)
